[LauraBastidas, predicción Churn.ipynb](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29401145/LauraBastidas.prediccion.Churn.ipynb)
# prediccion-churn-red-neuronal
Modelo de clasificación binaria (Keras/TensorFlow) para predecir la probabilidad de abandono de clientes, sobre una base de 10,000 registros
{
  "nbformat": 4,
  "nbformat_minor": 0,
  "metadata": {
    "colab": {
      "provenance": []
    },
    "kernelspec": {
      "name": "python3",
      "display_name": "Python 3"
    },
    "language_info": {
      "name": "python"
    }
  },
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 1,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "WF4bxho55E91",
        "outputId": "827d9e8a-4dc8-470d-fd02-c844d70f7ddb"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "¡Datos cargados exitosamente!\n",
            "Dimensiones de X (Características): (10000, 10)\n",
            "Dimensiones de y (Objetivo): (10000,)\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "# --- PASO 1: CARGA Y EXPLORACIÓN DE DATOS ---\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Cargamos el dataset\n",
        "dataset = pd.read_csv('Churn_Modelling.csv')\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Separamos X (características) e y (objetivo)\n",
        "X = dataset.iloc[:, 3:13].values\n",
        "\n",
        "# Seleccionamos exclusivamente la columna 13 para la variable objetivo\n",
        "y = dataset.iloc[:, 13].values\n",
        "\n",
        "# Imprimimos para confirmar que todo salió bien\n",
        "print(\"¡Datos cargados exitosamente!\")\n",
        "print(f\"Dimensiones de X (Características): {X.shape}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Dimensiones de y (Objetivo): {y.shape}\")"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# --- EDA: ANÁLISIS EXPLORATORIO DE DATOS ---\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "\n",
        "sns.set_theme(style=\"whitegrid\")\n",
        "fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))\n",
        "\n",
        "# ¿Cómo afecta el país (Geography) al Churn?\n",
        "sns.countplot(data=dataset, x='Geography', hue='Exited', palette=['#2ecc71', '#e74c3c'], ax=ax[0])\n",
        "ax[0].set_title('Churn por País')\n",
        "\n",
        "# ¿Cómo afecta el Género (Gender) al Churn?\n",
        "sns.countplot(data=dataset, x='Gender', hue='Exited', palette=['#2ecc71', '#e74c3c'], ax=ax[1])\n",
        "ax[1].set_title('Churn por Género')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 294
        },
        "id": "z9RHh1qq6NAX",
        "outputId": "1a3b7c26-f677-4d86-f55f-94ddcf2c61c0"
      },
      "execution_count": 2,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1200x400 with 2 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# --- PASO 2: PREPROCESAMIENTO ---\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder, OneHotEncoder, StandardScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Iniciando preprocesamiento...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Codificar Gender (Género) con LabelEncoder\n",
        "le = LabelEncoder()\n",
        "X[:, 2] = le.fit_transform(X[:, 2])\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Codificar Geography (País) con One-Hot Encoding\n",
        "ct = ColumnTransformer(transformers=[('encoder', OneHotEncoder(), [1])], remainder='passthrough')\n",
        "X = ct.fit_transform(X)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Dividir los datos en Entrenamiento y Prueba\n",
        "X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.2, random_state=0)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Escalar las características (StandardScaler)\n",
        "sc = StandardScaler()\n",
        "# Aprendemos las reglas y escalamos el entrenamiento\n",
        "X_train = sc.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
        "# Solo aplicamos las reglas al examen final (prueba)\n",
        "X_test = sc.transform(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"✅ Preprocesamiento completado. ¡Datos listos para la Red Neuronal!\")\n",
        "print(f\"Forma de X_train: {X_train.shape}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Forma de X_test: {X_test.shape}\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "nnnzHp3s6i0u",
        "outputId": "a0c8c5d0-d0a0-473d-a754-4f83f0302a8c"
      },
      "execution_count": 3,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Iniciando preprocesamiento...\n",
            "✅ Preprocesamiento completado. ¡Datos listos para la Red Neuronal!\n",
            "Forma de X_train: (8000, 12)\n",
            "Forma de X_test: (2000, 12)\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# --- PASO 3: MODELO BASE CON KERAS ---\n",
        "import tensorflow as tf\n",
        "from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential\n",
        "from tensorflow.keras.layers import Dense\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"🧠 Construyendo la Red Neuronal...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Definimos la variable\n",
        "classifier = Sequential()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Primera capa oculta (6 unidades, relu)\n",
        "classifier.add(Dense(units=6, activation='relu', input_dim=12))\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Segunda capa oculta (6 unidades, relu)\n",
        "classifier.add(Dense(units=6, activation='relu'))\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Capa de salida (1 unidad, sigmoid para predecir probabilidad 0 a 1)\n",
        "classifier.add(Dense(units=1, activation='sigmoid'))\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Compilación\n",
        "classifier.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='binary_crossentropy', metrics=['accuracy'])\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"✅ ¡Arquitectura construida y compilada con éxito!\")\n",
        "classifier.summary()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 323
        },
        "id": "RYPvFnsZ7JUU",
        "outputId": "db183091-8f5d-4a64-892f-9141b0d0bd49"
      },
      "execution_count": 4,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "🧠 Construyendo la Red Neuronal...\n",
            "✅ ¡Arquitectura construida y compilada con éxito!\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stderr",
          "text": [
            "/usr/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/keras/src/layers/core/dense.py:106: UserWarning: Do not pass an `input_shape`/`input_dim` argument to a layer. When using Sequential models, prefer using an `Input(shape)` object as the first layer in the model instead.\n",
            "  super().__init__(activity_regularizer=activity_regularizer, **kwargs)\n"
          ]
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "\u001b[1mModel: \"sequential\"\u001b[0m\n"
            ],
            "text/html": [
              "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"font-weight: bold\">Model: \"sequential\"</span>\n",
              "</pre>\n"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓\n",
              "┃\u001b[1m \u001b[0m\u001b[1mLayer (type)                   \u001b[0m\u001b[1m \u001b[0m┃\u001b[1m \u001b[0m\u001b[1mOutput Shape          \u001b[0m\u001b[1m \u001b[0m┃\u001b[1m \u001b[0m\u001b[1m      Param #\u001b[0m\u001b[1m \u001b[0m┃\n",
              "┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩\n",
              "│ dense (\u001b[38;5;33mDense\u001b[0m)                   │ (\u001b[38;5;45mNone\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m6\u001b[0m)              │            \u001b[38;5;34m78\u001b[0m │\n",
              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",
              "│ dense_1 (\u001b[38;5;33mDense\u001b[0m)                 │ (\u001b[38;5;45mNone\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m6\u001b[0m)              │            \u001b[38;5;34m42\u001b[0m │\n",
              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",
              "│ dense_2 (\u001b[38;5;33mDense\u001b[0m)                 │ (\u001b[38;5;45mNone\u001b[0m, \u001b[38;5;34m1\u001b[0m)              │             \u001b[38;5;34m7\u001b[0m │\n",
              "└─────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────┴───────────────┘\n"
            ],
            "text/html": [
              "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\">┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓\n",
              "┃<span style=\"font-weight: bold\"> Layer (type)                    </span>┃<span style=\"font-weight: bold\"> Output Shape           </span>┃<span style=\"font-weight: bold\">       Param # </span>┃\n",
              "┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩\n",
              "│ dense (<span style=\"color: #0087ff; text-decoration-color: #0087ff\">Dense</span>)                   │ (<span style=\"color: #00d7ff; text-decoration-color: #00d7ff\">None</span>, <span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">6</span>)              │            <span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">78</span> │\n",
              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",
              "│ dense_1 (<span style=\"color: #0087ff; text-decoration-color: #0087ff\">Dense</span>)                 │ (<span style=\"color: #00d7ff; text-decoration-color: #00d7ff\">None</span>, <span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">6</span>)              │            <span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">42</span> │\n",
              "├─────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────┼───────────────┤\n",
              "│ dense_2 (<span style=\"color: #0087ff; text-decoration-color: #0087ff\">Dense</span>)                 │ (<span style=\"color: #00d7ff; text-decoration-color: #00d7ff\">None</span>, <span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">1</span>)              │             <span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">7</span> │\n",
              "└─────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────┴───────────────┘\n",
              "</pre>\n"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "\u001b[1m Total params: \u001b[0m\u001b[38;5;34m127\u001b[0m (508.00 B)\n"
            ],
            "text/html": [
              "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"font-weight: bold\"> Total params: </span><span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">127</span> (508.00 B)\n",
              "</pre>\n"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {

              "\u001b[1m Trainable params: \u001b[0m\u001b[38;5;34m127\u001b[0m (508.00 B)\n"
            ],
            "text/html": [
              "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"font-weight: bold\"> Trainable params: </span><span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">127</span> (508.00 B)\n",
              "</pre>\n"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "\u001b[1m Non-trainable params: \u001b[0m\u001b[38;5;34m0\u001b[0m (0.00 B)\n"
            ],
            "text/html": [
              "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"font-weight: bold\"> Non-trainable params: </span><span style=\"color: #00af00; text-decoration-color: #00af00\">0</span> (0.00 B)\n",
              "</pre>\n"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# --- PASO 4: ENTRENAMIENTO Y EVALUACIÓN ---\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import confusion_matrix\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"🚀 Iniciando el entrenamiento de la Red Neuronal (100 épocas)...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Entrenamos el modelo\n",
        "# batch_size=10 significa que estudiará a los clientes en grupos de 10\n",
        "classifier.fit(X_train, y_train, batch_size=10, epochs=100)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n🧠 ¡Entrenamiento finalizado! Realizando predicciones del examen final...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Hacemos que la red prediga sobre los datos de prueba (X_test)\n",
        "# Esto nos devolverá probabilidades (ej. 0.85, 0.12, 0.99)\n",
        "y_pred_prob = classifier.predict(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Convertimos las probabilidades en 0 y 1\n",
        "# Si la probabilidad es > 0.5 será True (1), si no, False (0)\n",
        "y_pred = (y_pred_prob > 0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Creamos la Matriz de Confusión cruzando las respuestas reales (y_test) vs las predicciones (y_pred)\n",
        "cm = confusion_matrix(y_test, y_pred)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"✅ ¡Predicciones y Matriz de Confusión generadas con éxito!\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "tv-_v93J79fR",
        "outputId": "fad0d75f-4a40-43d2-f51d-4d863b8234c5"
      },
      "execution_count": 5,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "🚀 Iniciando el entrenamiento de la Red Neuronal (100 épocas)...\n",
            "Epoch 1/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m3s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.7939 - loss: 0.4949\n",
            "Epoch 2/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.7960 - loss: 0.4279\n",
            "Epoch 3/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8081 - loss: 0.3975\n",
            "Epoch 4/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8441 - loss: 0.3719\n",
            "Epoch 5/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8479 - loss: 0.3589\n",
            "Epoch 6/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8501 - loss: 0.3533\n",
            "Epoch 7/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 3ms/step - accuracy: 0.8541 - loss: 0.3502\n",
            "Epoch 8/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8561 - loss: 0.3475\n",
            "Epoch 9/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8564 - loss: 0.3460\n",
            "Epoch 10/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8577 - loss: 0.3450\n",
            "Epoch 11/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8565 - loss: 0.3443\n",
            "Epoch 12/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8585 - loss: 0.3427\n",
            "Epoch 13/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8584 - loss: 0.3424\n",
            "Epoch 14/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8600 - loss: 0.3419\n",
            "Epoch 15/100\n",

            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m3s\u001b[0m 3ms/step - accuracy: 0.8676 - loss: 0.3278\n",
            "Epoch 74/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m4s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8675 - loss: 0.3280\n",
            "Epoch 75/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m3s\u001b[0m 3ms/step - accuracy: 0.8664 - loss: 0.3281\n",
            "Epoch 76/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8654 - loss: 0.3278\n",
            "Epoch 77/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8673 - loss: 0.3280\n",
            "Epoch 78/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8660 - loss: 0.3270\n",
            "Epoch 79/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8661 - loss: 0.3277\n",
            "Epoch 80/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8666 - loss: 0.3268\n",
            "Epoch 81/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8654 - loss: 0.3274\n",
            "Epoch 82/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 3ms/step - accuracy: 0.8651 - loss: 0.3272\n",
            "Epoch 83/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8662 - loss: 0.3274\n",
            "Epoch 84/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8655 - loss: 0.3276\n",
            "Epoch 85/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8679 - loss: 0.3272\n",
            "Epoch 86/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8668 - loss: 0.3265\n",
            "Epoch 87/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8680 - loss: 0.3270\n",
            "Epoch 88/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8673 - loss: 0.3268\n",
            "Epoch 89/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 3ms/step - accuracy: 0.8661 - loss: 0.3272\n",
            "Epoch 90/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 3ms/step - accuracy: 0.8668 - loss: 0.3268\n",
            "Epoch 91/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8675 - loss: 0.3264\n",
            "Epoch 92/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8675 - loss: 0.3269\n",
            "Epoch 93/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8652 - loss: 0.3266\n",
            "Epoch 94/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8668 - loss: 0.3265\n",
            "Epoch 95/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8679 - loss: 0.3269\n",
            "Epoch 96/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m3s\u001b[0m 3ms/step - accuracy: 0.8670 - loss: 0.3268\n",
            "Epoch 97/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8683 - loss: 0.3266\n",
            "Epoch 98/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8689 - loss: 0.3263\n",
            "Epoch 99/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8677 - loss: 0.3266\n",
            "Epoch 100/100\n",
            "\u001b[1m800/800\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m2s\u001b[0m 2ms/step - accuracy: 0.8666 - loss: 0.3271\n",
            "\n",
            "🧠 ¡Entrenamiento finalizado! Realizando predicciones del examen final...\n",
            "\u001b[1m63/63\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 2ms/step\n",
            "✅ ¡Predicciones y Matriz de Confusión generadas con éxito!\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# --- PASO 5: ANÁLISIS DE RESULTADOS ---\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Calculamos e imprimimos la precisión (Accuracy)\n",
        "accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred)\n",
        "print(f\"🎯 Precisión del modelo (Accuracy): {accuracy:.4f} ({(accuracy*100):.2f}%)\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Imprimimos la Matriz de Confusión\n",
        "print(\"\\n📊 Matriz de Confusión (cm):\")\n",
        "print(cm)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Variable de texto\n",
        "conclusion_texto = \"\"\"\n",
        "Análisis de Resultados:\n",
        "El modelo entrenado ha logrado una precisión (accuracy) sólida, demostrando una buena capacidad general para predecir la retención de clientes.\n",
        "Al observar la matriz de confusión, se nota que el modelo es altamente efectivo identificando a los clientes que deciden quedarse (Verdaderos Negativos),\n",
        "lo cual es vital para no desperdiciar recursos de marketing. Sin embargo, como suele ocurrir en datasets desbalanceados, tiene un reto mayor\n",
        "identificando a todos los clientes que realmente abandonan (Falsos Negativos).\n",
        "En conclusión, la arquitectura Sequential con capas de 6 neuronas cumple exitosamente como modelo base, y el preprocesamiento de datos (One-Hot Encoding y StandardScaler) fue fundamental para que la red neuronal convergiera correctamente.\n",
        "\"\"\"\n",
        "print(conclusion_texto)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "vXiWzx2r9S-J",
        "outputId": "bc2bcaa5-ebe0-4f07-b029-0bde999de8d8"
      },
      "execution_count": 6,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "🎯 Precisión del modelo (Accuracy): 0.8685 (86.85%)\n",
            "\n",
            "📊 Matriz de Confusión (cm):\n",
            "[[1510   85]\n",
            " [ 178  227]]\n",
            "\n",
            "Análisis de Resultados:\n",
            "El modelo entrenado ha logrado una precisión (accuracy) sólida, demostrando una buena capacidad general para predecir la retención de clientes. \n",
            "Al observar la matriz de confusión, se nota que el modelo es altamente efectivo identificando a los clientes que deciden quedarse (Verdaderos Negativos), \n",
            "lo cual es vital para no desperdiciar recursos de marketing. Sin embargo, como suele ocurrir en datasets desbalanceados, tiene un reto mayor \n",
            "identificando a todos los clientes que realmente abandonan (Falsos Negativos). \n",
            "En conclusión, la arquitectura Sequential con capas de 6 neuronas cumple exitosamente como modelo base, y el preprocesamiento de datos (One-Hot Encoding y StandardScaler) fue fundamental para que la red neuronal convergiera correctamente.\n",
            "\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
